title: T-030 — GRN outbox consumer: auto-create incoming inspection
prompt:
# T-030 — GRN outbox consumer auto-create inspection

PRD: 09-QUALITY-PRD.md §12.1 grn.received consumer, §7.1 EPIC 8C 09-c-05
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Subscribe to 05-WH outbox event `grn.received`. For each GRN line whose product `items.inspection_required=true`, auto-create a quality_inspections row with inspection_type='incoming', reference_type='grn', reference_id=grn.id, specification_id resolved from the active spec for product+applies_to='incoming'.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/src/server/outbox/grnConsumer.ts` registers handler 'grn.received'.
2. For each line: lookup product.inspection_required and the active quality_specifications (status='active', applies_to in ('incoming','all')); skip if either missing (log SKIP reason).
3. INSERT quality_inspections {inspection_type:'incoming', reference_*, product_id, specification_id, specification_version, sampling_plan_id resolved via getDefaultSamplingPlan, scheduled_at=NOW+1h}.
4. Idempotency: on retry, check existing inspection rows by (reference_type='grn', reference_id, product_id) and skip duplicates.

## Files
- apps/web/src/server/outbox/grnConsumer.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/server/outbox/__tests__/grnConsumer.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a grn.received event with 2 lines (product A inspection_required=true, product B false), when the consumer processes it, then exactly 1 quality_inspections row is inserted (for A) and 0 for B
2. Given product A has no active spec for applies_to in ('incoming','all'), when the consumer processes the event, then 0 inspections are inserted and a structured warning log SKIP=spec_unresolved is emitted
3. Given the same event delivered twice (idempotency replay), when the consumer processes both, then exactly 1 quality_inspections row exists for that GRN+product (no duplicates)

pipeline_inputs.description: Outbox consumer for grn.received that auto-creates incoming inspections; spec resolution + idempotency.
pipeline_inputs.details: Handler registered in shared outbox poller. Filters lines by items.inspection_required. Resolves active spec via lookup. Idempotency check by (reference_type, reference_id, product_id). Emits structured warning when spec unresolved. Tests cover filtering, skip reason, replay idempotency.
out_of_scope: Do not implement other outbox consumers (allergen.changeover.requested → T-052)
Do not implement P2 wo.completed consumer
acceptance_criteria: Given a grn.received event with 2 lines (product A inspection_required=true, product B false), when the consumer processes it, then exactly 1 quality_inspections row is inserted (for A) and 0 for B

Given product A has no active spec for applies_to in ('incoming','all'), when the consumer processes the event, then 0 inspections are inserted and a structured warning log SKIP=spec_unresolved is emitted
Given the same event delivered twice, when the consumer processes both, then exactly 1 quality_inspections row exists for that (GRN, product) combination
test_strategy: RED: write apps/web/src/server/outbox/__tests__/grnConsumer.test.ts asserting filtering, skip reason, idempotency replay
risk_red_lines: Do not double-create inspections on retry (idempotency contract)
Do not silently swallow spec_unresolved (must emit structured warning)
Do not block the consumer chain on a single failing line (per-line error isolation)
